texto: It's funny how love can fit inside a brown cardboard box. With relationships, people often think that things pile up. But when it ends, they're surprised how few these things turn out to be. Or at least, how few things they are willing to let go of.
explicacao: Citação de Juan Miguel Sevilla sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It's funny how love can fit inside a brown cardboard box. With relationships, people often think …” articula amor, filipino, romance em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e romance.
